observation.command: ls /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3/ && for f in /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3/*.sysu.c; do echo "=== $f ==="; /workspace/YatCC/llvm/install/bin/clang -cc1 -dump-tokens "$f" 2>&1 | head -5; done
